task_completion.description: Initiate a Quote or Estimate transaction
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active transaction window or mode is clearly labeled as 'Quote', 'Estimate', or similar, rather than a standard 'Sale' or 'Invoice'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct corporate customer name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The customer name field in the transaction window contains exactly 'Greenfield Office Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Add Copy Paper A4 with the correct quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item for 'Copy Paper A4 (500 sheets)' is visible in the transaction list with a quantity of 20.

task_completion.description: Add Ballpoint Pen Blue with the correct quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item for 'Ballpoint Pen Blue (Box of 12)' is visible in the transaction list with a quantity of 10.

task_completion.description: Add Manila Folder with the correct quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line item for 'Manila Folder Letter Size (Pack of 25)' is visible in the transaction list with a quantity of 8.

task_completion.description: Save the transaction as a quote without processing payment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation that the quote/estimate was saved, recorded, or printed. There must be no payment processing window (e.g., cash/credit entry) or completed sale receipt indicating that funds were collected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Point of Sale software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown in the screenshots belongs to a POS application (Copper POS), not a generic text editor, spreadsheet, or mock-up tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted via the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking buttons, navigating menus, and typing into fields within the application's graphical user interface, rather than using a terminal or command prompt to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify no payment was accidentally processed
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots do not show any 'Payment Successful', 'Change Due', or 'Tendered' screens that would indicate a completed sale rather than an estimate.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application stores data in C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper (standard Windows convention for NCH Software applications).
